race.comment: STATE OF FURY (11) returned in good order but stepped out to 1700m last start and never featured when getting back and remaining there across the line. Back to 1300m now looks a good move and Watson hops back on board. Drawn better and she can bounce back to her best. REBELS (8) was solid on the Scarpside circuit here fresh before getting well back last start and closing steadily at Belmont. Comes here with a few boxes ticked, mainly the inside barrier and a slight rise in trip. Webster's claim comes in handy and he can put his best foot forward. THREE GRAND (5) is likely to get a long way back again from barrier 11, but she closed off strongly last start at Bunbury and the 100m is a bonus. Can feature on the back of that performance. COSMIC ECLIPSE (2) is better than she showed last time out and can return to form. MANTUA (9) is not out of this despite the wide barrier.
